heading: Judicial review; persons aggrieved; jurisdiction of courts of appeal
label: 1516 Judicial review; persons aggrieved; jurisdiction of courts of appeal

children.label: A
children.text: has participated in the administrative proceedings before the Secretary (or if he did not so participate, he can show that his failure to do so was caused by the Secretary’s failure to provide the required notice); and

children.label: B
children.text: is adversely affected by the Secretary’s action.
